name: The Prover
fear: being seen as not good enough
strategy: turn life into an exam that must be won
life_pull: high achievement with low inner satisfaction

name: The Controller
fear: losing control and suffering irreversible consequences
strategy: plan, delay, reduce variables, avoid irreversible choices

name: The Observer
fear: being trapped by emotion or foolish commitment
life_pull: knowing the path without entering it

name: The Escaper
fear: being trapped by pressure, intimacy, or responsibility

name: The Pleaser
fear: disappointing others or losing position in a relationship
strategy: say fine, suppress needs, avoid conflict
life_pull: being needed by many but understood by few

name: The Judge
strategy: criticize before the world can criticize
